prompt:
Style: slightly pixel art style, cute kawaii meme aesthetic, flat 2D cartoon illustration, bold black outlines, bright warm colors, chibi sprite, clean card layout

Content: vertical 3:4 social media post card. warm cream light ivory background with subtle soft gradient at edges. Center: clean white rounded rectangle card with thin gold border. Bold large rounded Chinese text centered on card: "基金净值 vs 份额" in dark charcoal. Top-left corner of card: small gold ¥ coin decoration. Bottom-right corner: small chibi pixel art orange cat (very large round head, golden coin ¥ eyes, red UP coin floating above forehead, kawaii open mouth with tongue, waving one tiny paw. Tiny pixel fish and gold coins around) peeking up from card edge with only head and tiny paws visible. Tiny pixel fish and gold coin sparkles near cat. Clean composition, cat is small accent (~1/8 of image), text dominates. All text in Chinese only except UP on the coin.

Image size: 960x1280
